MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
PTJ: Irving Pfeiffer, Clerks:P. Dias/M. Vallejo, CSR: Susan Crozier.
Appearances:
Plaintiff present with counsel, Thomas Wright, represented by Irene Robertson, property manager.
Edward Jackson, Defendant present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by written stipulation for entry of judgment.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record and filed.
